  • Method
net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface Passenger

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    PassengerImpl

    public interface Passenger
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Passenger'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Id
    • Sex
    • Height
    • Age
    • Weight
    • Door
    • Seat
    • Name
    • Boarding Time
    • Seat Ref
    • Width
    • Depth
    • Orientation In Degree
    • Position X
    • Position Y
    • Is Seated
    • Walking Speed
    • Start Boarding After Delay
    • Number Of Waits
    • Luggage Stow Time
    • Luggage Stowing Distance
    • Travel Class
    • Passenger Mood
    • Number Of Make Way Operations
    • Luggage
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getPassenger()

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        int getId()
        Returns the value of the 'Id' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'Id' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Id' attribute.
        See Also:
        setId(int), CabinPackage.getPassenger_Id()

      • setId

        void setId(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Id' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Id' attribute.
        See Also:
        getId()

      • getSex

        Sex getSex()
        Returns the value of the 'Sex' attribute. The literals are from the enumeration Sex.

      • getName

        java.lang.String getName()
        Returns the value of the 'Name' attribute. The default value is "Mr. Placeholder".

        If the meaning of the 'Name' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Name' attribute.
        See Also:
        setName(String), CabinPackage.getPassenger_Name()

      • setName

        void setName(java.lang.String value)
        Sets the value of the 'Name' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Name' attribute.

      • isIsSeated

        boolean isIsSeated()
        Returns the value of the 'Is Seated' attribute. The default value is "false".

        If the meaning of the 'Is Seated' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Is Seated' attribute.

        double getWalkingSpeed()
